case_title: BLOMBERG, TODD vs. ERLICH, SHRON et al

APPEARANCE REQUIRED UNLESS OTHERWISE NOTIFIED. (IF THERE IS A MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS ATTY. OF RECORD IT SHOULD BE COMPLETED BY 12/27/96) PLTF'S ATTY. TO FILE A BRIED DEC. IF PLTF. IS CONTACTED.
